# Address issue #3631: NTR — occlusal surface of tooth

## Summary

Issue #3631 requested a new term **"occlusal surface of tooth"** under
parent `tooth surface structure` (UBERON:8600148), with synonyms
*chewing surface* / *masticatory surface*, and two contributor ORCIDs
(https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9625-1899 and https://orcid.org/0009-0002-7282-0836).

On inspection, the term **already exists** as
[`UBERON:8600149`](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_8600149)
(created 2025-08-29, alongside the other tooth surface terms
UBERON:8600141–UBERON:8600148), so no new term was minted. The existing
term already had the correct name, definition, parent, and the first
contributor ORCID, but was missing some of the metadata the NTR asked for.

## Changes

In `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo`, on term `UBERON:8600149`:

- Added `synonym: "chewing surface" EXACT [https://dentaleducationhub.com/surfaces-of-the-teeth/]`
- Added `synonym: "masticatory surface" EXACT [https://dentaleducationhub.com/surfaces-of-the-teeth/]`
- Added `relationship: dc-contributor https://orcid.org/0009-0002-7282-0836`
- Added `property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/3631" xsd:anyURI`

Existing fields left intact:

- `def: "A tooth surface structure that forms the biting or grinding surface of a molar or premolar."` — semantically equivalent to the wording in the NTR (a chewing/grinding surface of premolars and molars) and already cites the two URLs given in the issue.
- `synonym: "occlusal surface" EXACT [...]`
- `is_a: UBERON:8600148 ! tooth surface structure` (matches the parent requested in the issue)
- `relationship: dc-contributor https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9625-1899`
- `property_value: dcterms-date "2025-08-29T11:00:00Z" xsd:dateTime` — original creation date preserved.

## Checklist

- [x] Verified term `UBERON:8600149` exists in `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo` via `obo-grep.pl`
- [x] Verified parent `UBERON:8600148 tooth surface structure` exists and is appropriate
- [x] Verified definition matches the source URLs (dentaleducationhub.com and HL7 FDI surface code system) from the NTR
- [x] Verified neither requested synonym (`chewing surface`, `masticatory surface`) was already present
- [x] Verified ORCID `0009-0002-7282-0836` was not already in the ontology
- [x] Sibling tooth-surface terms (incisal, mesial, distal, buccal, lingual, labial, facial) follow the same pattern — modeled the additions on those
- [x] Reserialised `src/ontology/uberon-edit.obo` via `robot convert`
- [x] Diff inspected; only the four expected lines were added

## Rationale

The request reduces to: "this term should exist with these synonyms and these contributors." Since the term already existed, creating a duplicate `UBERON:99xxxxx` term would have introduced a near-identical sibling under the same parent — bad for users and reasoners. The minimal, correct action is to enrich the existing term with the requested metadata and link the tracker item back to issue #3631 so the provenance is recorded.

Signed `@dragon-ai-agent`.
